name: emdad-desktop-app
description: Offline desktop bundle: NestJS (SQLite) + Admin + Client React apps (Electron).
author: Emdad 3PL

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix admin && npm install
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.build:all: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && npm run build:admin
scripts.dist: npm run build:all && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
